name: klat-connector
documentation:
# Klat API

![Run Unit Tests](https://github.com/NeonGeckoCom/klat-connector/workflows/Run%20Unit%20Tests/badge.svg?branch=master)

The `Klat Connector` provides programmatic access to the Klat server as a client.
Classes may extend the `KlatApi` class and interact with server events to create a 
chat client.

documentation: Handles incoming shout for this user

methods.name: klat_connector.mq_klat_api.KlatAPIMQ._send_shout
documentation:
Sends shout from current instance

```
param queue_name

MQ queue name for emit (optional for publish=True)

param message_body

dict with relevant message data

param exchange

MQ exchange name for emit

param exchange_type

type of exchange to use based on ExchangeType (direct, fanout, topic...)
```

\:returns generated shout id

functions.name: klat_connector._run_listener
documentation: Runs socket listeners indefinitely

functions.name: klat_connector.start_socket
documentation:
Initialize a socketIO connection to the specified server and port
\:param addr: url of socketIO server to connect to
\:param port: port used for socketIO
\:param retry_timeout: max seconds to try to establish a connection
\:return: socketIO Client

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer.shutdown_server
documentation: Terminates the server thread to end this process

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._create_local_server
documentation:
Creates a socketIO server
\:return: socketIO Server

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._generate_unique_nick
documentation:
Generates a unique nickname for a user
\:return: Random generated username

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._get_domain_cid
documentation:
Get a cid associated with a given domain
\:param dom: domain requested
\:param title: optional title for Private domain use
\:return: cid

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._change_socket_nick
documentation:
Update internal references when a socket nick changes
\:param old_nick: old nick associated with socket
\:param new_nick: new nick associated with socket
\:param cid: cid socket is connected to
\:param sid: socketID associated with request
\:return:

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._get_nicks_for_cid
documentation:
Handle a request for nicks in the current cid
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (cid requested)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._check_login
documentation:
Handle a login request
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (curr_nick, login_nick, curr_dom, hash_pass, ?, curr_cid, dev_uid)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._logout
documentation:
Handle a logout request
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (nick, domain, ?, cid, instanceID, col#, #col)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._get_conversation_list
documentation:
Handle a request for conversation list
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (pCid, cookieCid, mode, dom, nick, tab, hash, url, klatGuid, pageName, column, kinstance,

> allCookies, nano, welcomeMessage, fn)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._nickname
documentation:
Handle a request for nickname
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (myCNick, luname, ldom, myConversation, userTitle, myFollowsKey, myColumn, myKinstance, myPageName,

> myTtsLanguage, mySecondTtsLanguage, mySttLanguage, nano, uid, function)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._user_message
documentation:
Handle an incoming user message
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (msg, dom, cid, img, video, mode, imgData, showAnswers, audioBlobs, audioFileName, sttLanguage,

> ttsLanguage, ttsSecondLanguage, ttsGender, needsTranslation, cidForLink, cookies, name, fn)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._create_conversation
documentation:
Handle a request to create a conversation
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (domain, nick, cid, title, ImageURL, ArticleURL, msgFromNeon, PassHash, FirstShout, keychain)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._change_domain
documentation:
Handle a request to change domains
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: ("this one", curr_cid, new_dom)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._on_disconnect
documentation:
Handle a disconnected socket
\:param sid: SocketID disconnected
\:param data: ()

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._search_shouts_by_phrase
documentation:
Handle a search request
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (search_term, num_context, max_time)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._save_login
documentation:
Handle a Klat registration request
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (username, domain, hash_pass, color, cid, kinstance, col1, 1col, 1?, 1?, speech_rate, stt_engine,

> tts_name, tts_gender, tts_language, tts_language_2, stt_language, time_format, units, date_format,
> city, state, country, uid, ?)

methods.name: klat_connector.mach_server.MachKlatServer._get_log
documentation:
Handle a conversation log request
\:param sid: SocketID associated with request
\:param data: (myDomain, oldConversation, myConversation, myNick, myFollowsKey, myColumn,

> myMaxFollowedConversations, myContextMax, myContextTime, nano, lastShout, numShouts, function(err){})

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a Klat connection to the passed socket. Initially connects as a guest user in the passed domain.
\:param socket: socketio.client Client socket connection to the Klat server
\:param dom: initial Klat domain to connect to

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.ready
documentation:
Added for backwards-compat. Use klat_ready.wait() instead of polling ready
:return:

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.logged_in
documentation:
Wraps self.\_login to return login status
\:return: 0 = Disconnected, 1 = Guest, 2 = User

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.conversation_is_proctored
documentation:
Determines if there is a Proctor in the current conversation
\:return: Boolean if there is a proctor in the current conversation

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.conversation_users
documentation:
Returns an updated list of users in the current conversation
\:return: list of nicks in the current conversation

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.is_current_cid
documentation:
Checks if the passed cid is the current cid.
\:param cid: cid to check
\:return: True if cid is the current cid

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.send_shout
documentation:
Shout into the current conversation or else passed dom/cid
\:param shout: text to shout
\:param cid: CID to send shout into (Private cid for @user shout)
\:param dom: Domain associated with cid
Exposed API Methods

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.search_shout
documentation:
Search for a shout with the given input
\:param search: input string (regex supported) to match
\:param shout_context: Number of contextual shouts to return (before or after)
\:param shout_time: Max seconds of context to provide (before or after)

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.login_klat
documentation:
Login to klat.com with the passed username and password
\:param user: klat nick
\:param password: cleartext login password

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.logout_klat
documentation: Log out of current account

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.register_klat
documentation: Register a new user

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.change_domain
documentation:
Change to a new conversation domain
\:param new_dom: domain to go to

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.change_conversation
documentation:
Change to a new conversation by cid
\:param new_cid: cid to go to
\:param new_dom: domain for new_cid

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.get_private_conversation
documentation:
Helper function that wraps create_conversation and builds a title from a list of desired users.
Private conversation is created if not exists and cid is returned.
\:param users: list of users to include in the private conversation
\:return: cid of created conversation

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.create_conversation
documentation:
Creates a new Klat conversation with the given parameters
\:param dom: Domain for new conversation
\:param title: Title of new conversation
\:param goto: Flag switch to created conversation
\:param first_shout: First shout to send into new conversation
\:return: Created cid or null if failed

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.get_conversation_log
documentation:
Requests an update of the conversation history for the current conversation
\:param follows: Max number of followed conversations to get
\:param context: Max number of context shouts to get surrounding crossposts
\:param shouts: Max number of shouts to get
\:param age: Max age of shouts to get in seconds
\:param last: Millis time of oldest shout to get

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.handle_incoming_shout
documentation:
This function should be overridden to handle incoming messages
\:param user: user associated with shout
\:param shout: user's shout
\:param cid: cid shout belongs to
\:param dom: domain conversation belongs to
\:param timestamp: time of incoming shout
Handlers to be overridden

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.handle_login_return
documentation:
This function should be overridden to handle login return status
\:param status: non-success return code

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.handle_search_results
documentation:
This function should be overridden to handle search results
\:param kind: elements searched (i.e. "shouts")
\:param results: dict of matched and contextual shouts by cid

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi.handle_socket_reconnected
documentation: This function should be overridden to handle a server socket reconnection

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_connect
documentation: Handler for socket connection
Socket Listeners

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_disconnect
documentation: Handler for socket disconnection

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_connect_error
documentation: Handler for socket connection error

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_reconnect
documentation: Handler for socket reconnection

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_conversation_list
documentation:
Handler for "conversation list". Emits "nickname"
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_nickname
documentation:
Handler for "nickname". After this, \_profile is populated and we can send/receive messages
\:param args: Socket Arguments
\:return:

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_user_message
documentation:
Handler for "user message" (incoming shouts)
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_login_return
documentation:
Handler for "mobile login return". This is where nick is updated
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_new_domain
documentation:
Handler for "new domain". This is where dom and cid are updated
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_chat_log
documentation:
Handler for "chat log" Populates shout history for the current conversation
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_log_out
documentation:
Handler for "log out successful"
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_search_shouts_by_phrase_return
documentation:
Handler for "search shouts by phrase return"
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_nicks_list
documentation:
Handler for "new nick list"
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_save_login_return
documentation:
Handler for "save login return"
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._on_create_conversation_return
documentation:
Handler for "create conversation return
\:param args: Socket Arguments

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._parse_conversations_list
documentation:
Called by \_on_conversation_list to parse returned JSON object and collect new conversation data
\:param conversations_list: conversation data
\:return: current conversation data
Internal Functions

methods.name: klat_connector.klat_api.KlatApi._send_shout
documentation:
Internal function that sends a shout into the current conversation and throws an exception if not connected
\:param shout: text to shout
\:param dest_dom: Destination domain for the shout
\:param dest_cid: Destination cid for the shout
\:param orig_cid: CID the shout originated from
\:param cookies: JSON object associated with this instance
